description: §38.4/§38.6.1 (RULING A) — a channel `function tally()` escalated to the SERVER by its `broadcast()` call READS the client-held channel cell `@count`. Channel cells are client-held (no server-side value), so the read resolves to `undefined` at request time. Fires E-CHANNEL-SERVER-CELL-READ (RI).
rationale: §38.4/§38.6.1 (change-id channel-cell-write-client-side-A, RULING A): a server-context channel function (escalated via broadcast()/disconnect(), an onserver:* handler, or another §12.2 trigger) SHALL NOT read a channel-declared cell — it SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-SERVER-CELL-READ. Operate on the message payload / function arguments instead.
